enabled.title: Enable Agent Identity
enabled.description: Show the agent avatar overlay in the workspace.

motionLevel.title: Motion Level
motionLevel.description: Control the movement behavior of the agent (none: fixed, subtle: minimal breathing, playful: small oscillations).

directionMode.title: Direction Mode
directionMode.description: Use CSS sprite flip for left direction, or dedicated left/right assets when available.

debugMotion.title: Debug Motion
debugMotion.description: Enable low-noise motion diagnostics and presence zone outline.
